title: Thandizo ndi Thandizo
description: Tili pano kuti tikuthandizeni ndi mafunso kapena zovuta zilizonse zomwe mungakumane nazo mukamagwiritsa ntchito intaneti. Kaya mukufuna thandizo poyambira, khalani ndi funso lokhudza zina, kapena mukufuna kunena za vuto, tili pano kuti tikuthandizeni.

contact.title: Lumikizanani ndi Thandizo
contact.emailDesc: Tikufuna kuyankha maimelo onse mkati mwa maola 24.
contact.footer: Zikomo posankha pulogalamu yathu yapaintaneti. Tadzipereka kukupangani kuti zomwe mukukumana nazo zikhale zosavuta komanso zosangalatsa momwe tingathere.

detailedFeatures.title: Thandizo Latsatanetsatane la Mbali
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Kuwonongeka kwa Kulowetsa kwa Mawu ndi kuthekera kwa Mauthenga-Kulankhula pa chipangizo chilichonse.
